contact.bodyHtml:
Letters
Feel free to reach out 🤍
♡ ♡ ♡
💌
Letters (Marshmallow)
Questions / Compliments / Topics for chatting streams 🤍

There are submission periods, so it's not always open~
I'd love it if you sent questions, compliments, or topics you'd like me to talk about during chatting streams 🤍

Send a Letter 💌

Refunds are not available for any form of financial support, including donations, merchandise purchases, crowdfunding, or similar contributions. Therefore, I am unable to respond to inquiries regarding refunds. Please make your contributions only after careful consideration and at your own discretion.
♡ ♡ ♡
Mitarai Asobu
Mitarai Asobu
